issues.detail: The skill does not handle token file missing or network errors.
The implementation only provides Python code, lacking Node.js support.

scenarios.name: Sync a Stripe payment to Xero as a paid invoice
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses upsert_contact, create_invoice with ACCREC and AUTHORISED status, and mark_invoice_paid against the Payments endpoint as documented; baseline writes ad-hoc requests, often missing the Xero-Tenant-Id header, AUTHORISED status, or the separate Payments call.

scenarios.name: Pull monthly P&L summary for March 2025
scenarios.rationale: Treatment calls Reports/ProfitAndLoss with fromDate/toDate params and parses SummaryRow cells per the skill; baseline often guesses report endpoints or omits the tenant header and SummaryRow row-type filtering.
